title: NTRDeal's Items
description: Adds a highly configurable infusion system that uses armor trims. Each trim material has its own special effects!
body:
This mod adds many items and will have more in the future. This mod is for those who want variety in their armor and have cool looking armor. The features in the mod are listed below.

⚠ COMSOLITE OVERLAY DOES NOT WORK PROPERLY WITH SHADERS ⚠\
~~This mod has enchancments support, however it is not a dependancy~~


**Current Features:**

<details>
<summary>Materials</summary>

Lunarite – A mineral that spawns in lunarite geodes.\
Cosmolite – A very rare mineral that spawns in cosmolite geodes.
![Lunarite and cosmolite materials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pHRbDjf/images/aafb9b124eb063e14ded938375981b357595f738.png)

</details>



<details>
<summary>Lunarite/Cosmolite Armor</summary>

Lunarite & Cosmolite Armor Sets – Armor that can be infused, but only cosmolite can be enchanted.
![Lunarite and cosmolite armor sets.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pHRbDjf/images/ef3cafc2746a094883a8b76b941df04d5c069ef9.png)
</details>



<details>
<summary>Infusion System</summary>

Infusion System – Use armor trims and trim materials to give lunarite/cosmolite special effects. (Only trim material affects the infusion)\
![Infusing iron onto a cosmolite chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pHRbDjf/images/5b2350c5807cb33308904b998cbe8abf16f6c8bc.png)
</details>



<details>
<summary>Geode Spawns</summary>

Geode Spawns – There are lunarite and cosmolite geodes that generate in the world and provide access to the materials. Cosmolite geodes only spawn in the nether.
![Naturally spawning lunarite geode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pHRbDjf/images/74b3926b28d92a27167f2ad5b3f707f6aa06797c.png)
![Naturally spawning cosmolite geode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/9pHRbDjf/images/c8dbfc8a1a53ba9e10c3e7648fa80ce2acae676a.png)
</details>
